EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IDENetworkDataset

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that describe network dataset data elements.

[Guid("71E4AA21-1957-4224-B505-984C189AA520")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IDENetworkDataset

Properties

Attributes

Array of network attributes in this network dataset.

IArray Attributes { get; set; }

Property Value

IArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

Buildable

Indicates if this network dataset is buildable.

bool Buildable { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ConfigurationKeyword

The database configuration keyword for the network dataset.

string ConfigurationKeyword { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<p>Configuration keywords can be of two types:</p> <ul> <li>esriConfigurationKeywordGeneral, which references storage parameters for creating feature classes and tables</li> <li>esriConfigurationKeywordNetwork, which references storage parameters for creating geometric networks or network datasets</li> <li>esriConfigurationKeywordTopology, which references storage parameters for creating topologies</li> </ul> <p>An enumeration of <strong>ConfigurationKeyword</strong> objects for an ArcSDE or File geodatabase workspace is returned by the <strong>IWorkspaceConfiguration</strong> interface.</p>

DefaultTravelModeName

Name of default network travel mode for this network dataset.

string DefaultTravelModeName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Directions

The directions settings for the network dataset.

INetworkDirections Directions { get; set; }

Property Value

INetworkDirections

Examples

Sample Snippet

ElevationModel

The type of the network elevation model.

esriNetworkElevationModel ElevationModel { get; set; }

Property Value

esriNetworkElevationModel

Examples

Sample Snippet

HierarchyClusterAttribute

The network attribute that is used to optimize network building for hierarchical traversal.

INetworkAttribute HierarchyClusterAttribute { get; set; }

Property Value

INetworkAttribute

Examples

Sample Snippet

HierarchyLevelCount

The number of hierarchy levels in the network dataset.

int HierarchyLevelCount { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxValueForHierarchy[int]

The maximum value for the specified hierarchy level in the network dataset.

int MaxValueForHierarchy[int Level] { get; set; }

Parameters

Level int

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

The type of the network dataset.

esriNetworkDatasetType NetworkType { get; set; }

esriNetworkDatasetType

Property set of this network dataset.

Array of network sources in this network dataset.

IArray Sources { get; set; }

IArray

Indicates if this network dataset supports network turn elements.

bool SupportsTurns { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

string TimeZoneAttributeName { get; set; }

string

string

Array of network travel modes in this network dataset.
